subcodes.first_line: O Joseph! I behold thee deprived of the fragrance of the divine Raiment. Strange indeed it is that the eye of Jacob [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یوسف از عرف قمیص رحمانی محروم مشاهده میشوی عجب در آنست که چشم یعقوب
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @belief and denial, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
